name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Photo M24606 Tag Style】This Speedy 18 bag is crafted from Monogram coated canvas, allowing you to add accessories from the LV&I set, such as the shoulder strap and chain, cute decorations, hair clips, pouches, key holders, or LV Link logos, to boldly express your individuality. The exquisite construction hides ample space, and multiple carrying ways make daily essentials easy to carry. 18.5 x 12.5 x 10.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
